summary: Dependabot updater exited with an error because it determined no security update was needed for the dependency 'rand' (security-only run), and the updater returned a non-zero exit code.
root_cause: Dependabot reported a 'security_update_not_needed' error for dependency 'rand' during a security-only update and the updater process exited with code 1.

evidence.quote: no security update needed as rand is no longer vulnerable
evidence.reason: Shows Dependabot determined that the dependency 'rand' does not need a security update.
The summary errors table explicitly lists a 'security_update_not_needed' error type.

evidence.quote: Error: Command failed with exit code 1: /bin/sh -c $DEPENDABOT_HOME/dependabot-updater/bin/run update_files
evidence.reason: The updater process terminated with a non-zero exit code, causing the container/job to fail.
The job definition shows this was a security-only update run, which explains why Dependabot aborted when no security fix was needed.

evidence.quote: For more information see: https://github.com/rust-lang/cargo/network/updates/1333710739 (write access to the repository is required to view the log)
evidence.reason: Indicates additional logs are gated by repository write access, which may be needed to inspect full details of the updater run.
Confirms the updater reported an error count and the job reported failure.

suggested_fix: No action is required if the dependency is indeed no longer vulnerable. If you expected an update, run a non-security update (set "security-updates-only" to false) or update the dependency version manually. To inspect full updater logs, grant the runner/Dependabot the repository write access noted in the error message so you can view the detailed log at the provided URL.
